meta.title: Tayama Ski Area
meta.description: Hachimantai near Appi—max pitch 37°, ¥2,720 day ticket, racing infrastructure and afternoon powder.

hero.eyebrow: Hachimantai, Iwate · walk from JR Tayama
hero.title:
Tayama
Ski Area
hero.tagline: Beside Appi—37° pitches, untouched afternoon powder, and Japan's only permanent biathlon course.

live.subtitle: Lift status, snow, and crowds at a glance

sanctuary.title:
37° runs,
empty powder.
sanctuary.lead: About 80% of three courses are intermediate to advanced. Racers focus on pole training on groomed runs, so ungroomed zones often hold fresh tracks into the afternoon—a local hill for advanced skiers avoiding Appi crowds.
sanctuary.noticeBody: Few beginner slopes—mostly steep terrain and racing facilities. Lift operations vary with snow; check today's status before you go.
sanctuary.imgAlt: Steep powder burn at Tayama Ski Area

primary.title: 37° × ¥2,720 × no queues
primary.lead: Minutes from Appi Kogen (21 courses)—adult day ticket ¥2,720 with short lift lines. Slalom and Uma-no-se courses hit 37° for serious alpine training.
primary.imgAlt: Steep racing terrain on a Hachimantai local hill

secondary.title: Racing infrastructure
secondary.lead: Permanent biathlon course, jump hills, and cross-country—national championship venue and daily training base for race teams.

pass.title:
¥2,720 all day,
beside Appi.
pass.lead: Adult day ticket ¥2,720 (junior/senior ¥2,090). ~15 minutes from Tohoku Expwy Ando IC, ~15-minute walk from JR Tayama—day trip option while staying at Appi. Check lift and snow status at the top of this page.

hike.title:
After skiing,
ramen & salt onsen.
hike.lead: Danburite (mala ramen), Tayama Drive-In (mushroom ramen), Papanaashu (wagyu burger)—classic post-ski stops near the hill.
hike.leadCurry: Recover at Shin-Appi Onsen Seiryukaku's strong salt spring—a standard Appi-area loop.

tour.title:
From Tayama Stn.,
half a day.
tour.lead: Day trip from Appi or stay in town—ski, eat ramen, soak onsen in one Hachimantai loop.

05.title: Fudo Falls
05.body: Power spot on the way back

sanctuary.title: Racing & powder guide
sanctuary.body: Next to Appi—37° pitches, permanent biathlon course, afternoon ungroomed powder. Hachimantai's hill for advanced skiers and racers.

workation.title: Appi × Tayama split stay
workation.body: Sleep at Appi, ski at Tayama—a day-trip model that cuts cost and crowds.

lake.title: Hachimantai regional tour
lake.body: Pair with Hachimantai Resort and Okudakaya Kogen for a northern Tohoku ski loop.

access.note: Tohoku Expwy Ando IC ~15 min · JR Hanawa Line Tayama Stn. ~15 min walk · lodge parking
